allow: PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\mayur\\Converter Website"; npm install --strict-ssl false 2>&1; Write-Host "EXIT:$LASTEXITCODE")

PowerShell($body = '{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GVRaarcnswo"}'; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/info" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; Write-Host "Title: $\($result.title\)"; Write-Host "Platform: $\($result.platform\)"; Write-Host "Formats: $\($result.formats.Count\)")

PowerShell($body = '{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GVRaarcnswo"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/info" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 40; Write-Host "Title:   " $r.title; Write-Host "Platform:" $r.platform; Write-Host "Presets: " $r.presets.Count; Write-Host "Formats: " $r.formats.Count)

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; cd "c:\\Users\\mayur\\Converter Website"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; $body = '{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GVRaarcnswo"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/info" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 40; Write-Host "YouTube OK - Title:" $r.title.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(50,$r.title.Length\)\); Write-Host "Presets:" $r.presets.Count "| Formats:" $r.formats.Count)

PowerShell($url = "http://localhost:3000/api/download?url=" + [uri]::EscapeDataString\("https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GVRaarcnswo"\) + "&format_id=best"; $wc = New-Object System.Net.WebClient; $wc.DownloadFile\($url, "C:\\Users\\mayur\\test_video.mp4"\); $size = \(Get-Item "C:\\Users\\mayur\\test_video.mp4"\).Length; Write-Host "Downloaded: $\([math]::Round\($size/1MB, 1\)\) MB"; Remove-Item "C:\\Users\\mayur\\test_video.mp4" -Force)

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\mayur\\Converter Website"; Start-Process -NoNewWindow -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "server.js"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/info" -Method POST -Body '{"url":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GVRaarcnswo"}' -ContentType "application/json"; Write-Host "API OK: $\($r.title\)")
